questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "announce"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "complain"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "promise"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "warn"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "advise"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "suggest"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "agree"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "refuse"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "offer"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "remind"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "insist"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "reply"?
Choose the best word: She _____ed going by train.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She suggested going by train." — từ đúng là "suggest" (gợi ý).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They _____d to help.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They agreed to help." — từ đúng là "agree" (đồng ý).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____d to answer.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He refused to answer." — từ đúng là "refuse" (từ chối).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed to drive.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She offered to drive." — từ đúng là "offer" (đề nghị).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ed me to call.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He reminded me to call." — từ đúng là "remind" (nhắc nhở).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed on paying.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She insisted on paying." — từ đúng là "insist" (khăng khăng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He replied that he agreed. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He replied that he agreed." — từ đúng là "reply" (trả lời).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____d her opinion clearly.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She stated her opinion clearly." — từ đúng là "state" (tuyên bố).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ed that he was scared.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He whispered that he was scared." — từ đúng là "whisper" (thì thầm).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They _____ed us of the change.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They informed us of the change." — từ đúng là "inform" (thông báo).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed more time.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She requested more time." — từ đúng là "request" (yêu cầu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____d for being late.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He apologized for being late." — từ đúng là "apologize" (xin lỗi).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He said he ___ tired.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: present 'am' shifts to past 'was'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She told me she ___ busy.
questions.explanation: Backshift of 'is' to 'was' in reported speech.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They said they ___ come the next day.
Complete the sentence: He asked where I ___.
questions.explanation: Reported question uses statement word order, past tense.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She said she ___ finished her work.
questions.explanation: Present perfect shifts to past perfect ('had').

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He told me he ___ help me.
Complete the sentence: She said she ___ English every day.
Complete the sentence: He said he ___ go to the party.
Complete the sentence: They said they ___ seen the film.
Complete the sentence: She asked if I ___ free.
questions.explanation: Reported yes/no question uses 'if' and backshift.

questions.question: Which English word means "thông báo"?
Which English word means "phàn nàn"?
Which English word means "hứa"?
Which English word means "cảnh báo"?
Which English word means "khuyên"?
Which English word means "gợi ý"?
